case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $9,900.00 U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: REPLY TO OPPOSITION TO MTN TO STRIKE CLAIM OF SAMUEL E BINDER FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA
ORDER GRANTING PETITIONER'S MOTION TO STRIKE CLAIM OF SAMUEL E. BINDER
MOTION TO STRIKE, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA HEARING SET FOR OCT-24-2007 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO STRIKE. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING: GRANTED. THE ATTORNEY'S DECLARATION DOES NOT COMPLY WITH CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 446 BECAUSE IT DOES NOT EXPLAIN WHY THE ATTORNEY IS MAKING THE VERIFICATION. HEALTH AND SAFETY CODE SECTION 11488.5 (C)(1) PRECLUDES THE USE OF THE VERIFICATION IN ANY CRIMINAL PROCEEDING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR #8600
